title: Aditya Birla's Gauri Joshi joins Godrej Housing Finance as Head - Legal
description: Gauri Joshi has joined Godrej Housing Finance Limited as Head - Legal.Joshi is an alumna of Savitribai Phule Pune University. She also earned her LLM in Business Laws from the same University.With over 13 years of experience, she has been engaged in legal leadership positions across multiple reputed organisations in the banking & finance sector.
